title: Redesign Login Page and Add Landing Page for Kollect Lite

requirements.text: Redesign the LoginPrompt component (frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx) with a clean, modern aesthetic. The login page should feature a bold hero area with the Kollect Lite logo/wordmark, a concise tagline, and a prominently styled 'Login with Internet Identity' button. Use the app's existing teal brand color as the primary accent, layered on a deep charcoal or off-white background with generous whitespace and refined typography.

quotes: generate a UI design for a login page and a landing page for the Kollect Lite app. make it clean and aesthetic

acceptanceCriteria: Login page displays the Kollect Lite logo/wordmark prominently.
A short, descriptive tagline is visible below the logo.
The Internet Identity login button is clearly styled with the teal accent color.
Layout is centered, uses generous whitespace, and feels uncluttered.
Design is visually consistent with the teal + charcoal color palette.

requirements.text: Create a new landing page component (frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx) for Kollect Lite that is shown to unauthenticated visitors before they log in. The landing page must include: (1) a hero section with the app logo, headline, and a call-to-action 'Get Started' button that triggers Internet Identity login; (2) a features section highlighting 3–4 core capabilities of the app (e.g., Case Management, Activity Tracking, Document Handling, Role-Based Access) with icon cards; (3) a minimal footer with copyright. Apply the same clean teal + charcoal visual theme as the login page.

quotes: generate a UI design for a login page and a landing page for the Kollect Lite app. make it clean and aesthetic

acceptanceCriteria: Landing page is rendered when the user is unauthenticated (in place of or alongside the login page).
Hero section contains the Kollect Lite branding, a headline, and a CTA button.
Features section shows at least 3 feature cards with icons and short descriptions.
Page design is clean, aesthetic, and uses the teal + charcoal brand palette consistently.

requirements.text: Update the router in frontend/src/App.tsx to display the new LandingPage for unauthenticated users as the root route, ensuring that logging in transitions the user to the Task Queue as before.

quotes: generate a UI design for a login page and a landing page for the Kollect Lite app. make it clean and aesthetic

acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users see the LandingPage at the root route.
After logging in via Internet Identity, users are redirected to the Task Queue.
Authenticated users are not shown the landing page.

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive visual theme across the login and landing pages: use a deep charcoal (#1A1F2E or similar dark tone) as the background, the existing brand teal (oklch-based CSS variable) as the primary accent color, clean sans-serif typography with clear hierarchy (large hero titles, medium subheadings, small body), subtle card shadows, and smooth hover transitions on interactive elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Both pages use the same color palette (charcoal background, teal accents).
Typography hierarchy is clear and consistent across headings and body text.
Interactive elements (buttons, cards) have visible hover/focus states.
No visual inconsistencies between the login and landing pages.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not modify frontend/src/main.tsx or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Internet Identity remains the sole authentication mechanism — do not introduce any other auth flows.
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
nonGoals: Adding new backend endpoints or modifying backend/main.mo.
Building new authenticated app features beyond routing to the existing Task Queue.
Adding animations or heavy motion libraries.

required: Minimalist abstract geometric logo mark for Kollect Lite — teal and white angular shapes on a transparent background (kollect-lite-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Subtle dark textured hero background with faint grid or dot pattern in deep charcoal tones (hero-bg.dim_1440x900.png)
